data.title: Supreme Court Hears TikTok Arguments With App's Ban Ahead: 'Essentially, The Platform Shuts Down'
data.description: The U.S. Supreme Court hears oral arguments on Friday in the case regarding legislation that could ban TikTok in the United States in nine days.

data.title: Oil Surges As US Unleashes Toughest Sanctions On Russia's Energy Sector
data.description: The U.S. is set to impose tough sanctions on Russia's oil industry according to a leaked Treasury document, per Reuters. These sanctions are expected to disrupt Russian oil exports to India and China, pushing global oil prices higher.

data.title: Iovance Biotherapeutics Shares Are Falling Today: What's Going On?
data.description: Shares of Iovance Biotherapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: IOVA) are trading lower Friday. The company announced the inducement stock option grants under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

data.title: Why CureVac (CVAC) Shares Are Volatile
data.description: CureVac shares have been volatile over the past week, gaining some 25%. The stock has seen increased trading volume following the U.S.'s first human death from H5N1 bird flu.

data.title: What's Going On With Siyata Mobile Stock Friday?
data.description: Siyata shares are moving lower on Friday after the company announced that it has postponed its press conference
